NO FEE

LOCATION LOCATION LOCATION - Live a block away from Central Park!

Bright and spacious 1 Bedroom 1 Bath Apartment in the heart of Lincoln Square and Upper West Side.

No elevator in the Building, 5th floor walk up. (4 Flights)

Apartment features:

-Large living room
-Ample closet + storage space
-Laundry in the building

Subways: B, C and 1

Located on a peaceful block on West 68th Street, near the best restaurants and shops. Only 10 minutes away from Columbus Circle, Whole Foods, Equinox and more!
